ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trails" (
  "trail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trail */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the trail */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trail */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the trail is located */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the trail in miles */,
  "surface_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the surface type of the trail */,
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the rating of the trail */,
  "elevation_gain" REAL /* Elevation gain of the trail in feet */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the trail */,
  "coordinates" TEXT /* Geographic coordinates of the trail */,
  "trail_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of trail */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trail was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trail was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trails_rating_id FOREIGN KEY ("rating_id") REFERENCES ratings ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trails_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trails_trail_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("trail_type_id") REFERENCES trail_types ("trail_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trails_surface_id FOREIGN KEY ("surface_id") REFERENCES surfaces ("surface_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Abbreviated code for the state (e.g., CO, CA, NY) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "surfaces" (
  "surface_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each surface type */,
  "surface_type" TEXT /* Type of surface (e.g., Asphalt, Concrete, Dirt) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("surface_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "rating_name" TEXT /* Name of the rating */,
  "rating_description" TEXT /* Description of the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trail_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "trail_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trail the image belongs to */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "image_description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trail_images_trail_id FOREIGN KEY ("trail_id") REFERENCES trails ("trail_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "trail_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trail being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user leaving the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was left */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_trail_id FOREIGN KEY ("trail_id") REFERENCES trails ("trail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review being responded to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user leaving the response */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date the response was left */,
  "response_text" TEXT /* Text of the response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_responses_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_responses_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trail_types" (
  "trail_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trail type */,
  "trail_type" TEXT /* Type of trail */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trail_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trail_conditions" (
  "trail_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trail */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Current condition of the trail */,
  "condition_description" TEXT /* Description of the trail condition */,
  "condition_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the condition was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trail_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trail_ratings_history" (
  "trail_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trail */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the trail */,
  "rated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trail_id", "rated_at")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_badges" (
  "badge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each badge */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who earned the badge */,
  "trail_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trail that was completed to earn the badge */,
  "badge_name" TEXT /* Name of the badge */,
  "badge_description" TEXT /* Description of the badge */,
  "earned_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the badge was earned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("badge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_badges_trail_id FOREIGN KEY ("trail_id") REFERENCES trails ("trail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_badges_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
